acceptagentrequest.name: AcceptAgentRequest
acceptagentrequest.description: Grants permission to accept a pending approval request from the agent

canceltask.name: CancelTask
canceltask.description: Grants permission to cancel a task

cancelturn.name: CancelTurn
cancelturn.description: Grants permission to cancel an in-progress conversation turn

createagentspace.name: CreateAgentSpace
createagentspace.description: Grants permission to create a new FinOps Agent workspace

createautomation.name: CreateAutomation
createautomation.description: Grants permission to create a reusable automation

createconnection.name: CreateConnection
createconnection.description: Grants permission to create a connection

createconversation.name: CreateConversation
createconversation.description: Grants permission to create a new conversation with the FinOps Agent

createdocument.name: CreateDocument
createdocument.description: Grants permission to create a document

createintegration.name: CreateIntegration
createintegration.description: Grants permission to create a third-party integration

createonetimeloginsession.name: CreateOneTimeLoginSession
createonetimeloginsession.description: Grants permission to create a one-time login session for the FinOps Agent web application

createtask.name: CreateTask
createtask.description: Grants permission to create a task

createturn.name: CreateTurn
createturn.description: Grants permission to create a new turn in a conversation

deleteagentspace.name: DeleteAgentSpace
deleteagentspace.description: Grants permission to delete a FinOps Agent workspace

deleteartifact.name: DeleteArtifact
deleteartifact.description: Grants permission to delete an artifact and its content

deleteautomation.name: DeleteAutomation
deleteautomation.description: Grants permission to delete an automation

deleteconnection.name: DeleteConnection
deleteconnection.description: Grants permission to delete a connection

deletedocument.name: DeleteDocument
deletedocument.description: Grants permission to delete a document

deleteintegration.name: DeleteIntegration
deleteintegration.description: Grants permission to delete a third-party integration

getagentrequest.name: GetAgentRequest
getagentrequest.description: Grants permission to view details of a pending approval request from the agent

getagentspace.name: GetAgentSpace
getagentspace.description: Grants permission to view details of a FinOps Agent workspace

getartifactcontent.name: GetArtifactContent
getartifactcontent.description: Grants permission to download artifact content

getartifactmetadata.name: GetArtifactMetadata
getartifactmetadata.description: Grants permission to view artifact metadata

getautomation.name: GetAutomation
getautomation.description: Grants permission to view details of an automation

getconnection.name: GetConnection
getconnection.description: Grants permission to view details of a connection

getdocumentcontent.name: GetDocumentContent
getdocumentcontent.description: Grants permission to download document content

getdocumentmetadata.name: GetDocumentMetadata
getdocumentmetadata.description: Grants permission to view document metadata

getintegration.name: GetIntegration
getintegration.description: Grants permission to view details of a third-party integration

gettask.name: GetTask
gettask.description: Grants permission to view details of a task

getturn.name: GetTurn
getturn.description: Grants permission to view details of a conversation turn

listagentspaces.name: ListAgentSpaces
listagentspaces.description: Grants permission to list all FinOps Agent workspaces in the account

listintegrations.name: ListIntegrations
listintegrations.description: Grants permission to list third-party integrations

listrecords.name: ListRecords
listrecords.description: Grants permission to list records for real-time agent activity display

listturns.name: ListTurns
listturns.description: Grants permission to list turns in a conversation

rejectagentrequest.name: RejectAgentRequest
rejectagentrequest.description: Grants permission to reject a pending approval request from the agent

restoredocument.name: RestoreDocument
restoredocument.description: Grants permission to restore an archived document

sendfeedback.name: SendFeedback
sendfeedback.description: Grants permission to submit feedback on agent responses

updateagentspace.name: UpdateAgentSpace
updateagentspace.description: Grants permission to update a FinOps Agent workspace configuration

updateautomation.name: UpdateAutomation
updateautomation.description: Grants permission to update an automation

updateconnection.name: UpdateConnection
updateconnection.description: Grants permission to update a connection

updatedocument.name: UpdateDocument
updatedocument.description: Grants permission to update a document's content and metadata
